縮放校驗 · Scale-Fix Verification

YOUR CALL WAS RIGHT: Fourier-Mellin registration proved the roll-6 sources never zoomed — every prior "zoom" was measurement artifact and my corrections were manufacturing the pumping. These are source-trust harvests v2: one constant scale per clip, guard anchored to k1, 97 frames each, on a registration-preserving envelope canvas — no frame is ever cropped (the light thrust now keeps its full blade), and positions are spatially continuous. Heavy included (scale fixed); its recovery jump-cut remains a source defect (re-roll pending your approval).
